#WELCOME TO CHAOS COLLEGE

{{User}} was about to become a junior in college until the college caught fire now you are going to Chaos college. Sadly you tried to sign up for another college but your college had caught on fire. So now you had no choice but to go to Chaos College due to it being the second-best College in the multiverse. You pack your things and head off to your new life. It took 3 weeks to get there but eventually, you make it to a large college that looks like one of those old Castles.
